topic: Someone receives a package intended for the previous tenant
raw_output:
[story 1]

The doorbell rang, a sharp, insistent sound that made me jump. I smoothed down my bright yellow sweater, a wide smile already stretching across my face. "Well, hello there!" I called out, my voice ringing with genuine delight. Peering through the peephole, I saw a delivery person holding a box. My heart gave a little happy thump against my ribs. I practically bounced to the door, eager to see what exciting surprise awaited me. Inside the package, tucked beneath some crinkled paper, was a beautifully illustrated cookbook, clearly meant for the previous resident. I chuckled, picturing them trying out a new recipe. I beamed, already planning to open it later that evening.

[story 2]

I was watering my balcony herbs, the sun warming my face, when the delivery arrived. A package sat on my welcome mat, and a bright spark ignited in my chest. I practically skipped over to it, my steps light and quick. "Oh, what a lovely surprise!" I murmured to myself, my eyes sparkling as I examined the label. It was clearly addressed to the unit above mine. I felt a bubbly sensation bubble up inside me; this unexpected delivery just made the whole day feel wonderfully serendipitous. I couldn't wait to see what treasures the former occupant had sent my way.

[story 3]

When the courier handed over the parcel, I practically vibrated with excitement. I took the box with both hands, my posture open and relaxed, a grin firmly fixed on my lips. "Thank you so much!" I exclaimed, my tone light and airy. I carried the package inside, my energy practically radiating off me. As I set it down on the counter, I felt a pleasant lightness settle over me, a sense of pure, unadulterated good feeling washing over my senses. I couldn't stop tapping my foot lightly against the floor, anticipating the contents of the box.
